# Safeparts

LLM index for this repository.
Read `llms-full.txt` for the detailed, code-backed guide (APIs, invariants, change recipes).

## Safety / privacy (treat as secrets)
- Share strings, SharePacket bytes, reconstructed secrets, ciphertext, and passphrases.
- Do not paste real secrets/shares into issues, chat, logs, screenshots, or test fixtures.
- Use synthetic inputs in examples/tests. Do not commit generated build output (notably `web/src/wasm_pkg/` and `target/`).

## What this repo ships
- Rust library: `crates/safeparts_core/` (split/combine, packet format, encodings, optional encryption)
- CLI: `crates/safeparts/` -> `safeparts`
- TUI: `crates/safeparts_tui/` -> `safeparts-tui` (+ `safeparts tui` launcher)
- WASM bindings: `crates/safeparts_wasm/` (wasm-bindgen API used by the web UI)
- Web UI: `web/` (Vite + React, local-only WASM)
- Help site: `web/help/` (Astro/Starlight, built into `web/dist/help/`)

## Read order (entry points)
1. `llms-full.txt`
2. Core API + invariants: `crates/safeparts_core/src/lib.rs`
3. Packet format: `crates/safeparts_core/src/packet.rs`
4. CLI contract: `crates/safeparts/src/main.rs`
5. TUI contract: `crates/safeparts_tui/src/domain.rs` and `crates/safeparts_tui/src/app.rs`
6. WASM contract: `crates/safeparts_wasm/src/lib.rs`
7. Web UI flows: `web/src/components/SplitForm.tsx` and `web/src/components/CombineForm.tsx`
8. CI truth: `.github/workflows/`

## High-value repo docs (secondary sources)
- `AGENTS.md` (repo snapshot + check pointers)
- `PRD.md` (intent + threat model)
- `README.md` (quickstart)
- `docs/agents/checks.md` (commands that match CI)
- `docs/agents/conventions.md` (repo standards)
- `web/help/src/content/docs/` (end-user docs; may lag code)

## CI-style commands
- Rust: `cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo test --all-features`
- Web (from `web/`): `bun install && bun run build:wasm && bun run build`
- Docs (from `web/help/`): `bun install && bun run build`

## Encoding name collision (important)
- CLI flags: `base64`, `base58`, `mnemo-words`, `mnemo-bip39`
- WASM/web strings: `base64url`, `base58check`, `mnemo-words`, `mnemo-bip39`
